subject: FW: MEMO - Epstein
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 

-----Original Message-----
From: Farkas, Andrew L. [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Monday, November 12, 2007 9:47 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Fw: MEMO - Epstein

The attached was issued in connection with the annual asset mgt review
and audit required by igy lenders. Let's talk about it when we have some
time. I am certain we can organize something appropriate. 

----- Original Message -----
From: Boyd, Jeff
To: Farkas, Andrew L.
Sent: Mon Nov 12 09:27:49 2007
Subject: MEMO - Epstein

Andrew I believe this is what you were looking for     Please review and
let me know
